task_description: Fix all 73 CodeQL security scanning alerts in the Quant-Ecosystem repository. Primary categories: XSS via SSR sanitization bypass (dangerouslySetInnerHTML with unsanitized content during server-side rendering), ReDoS from polynomial regex patterns in email/URL validation, and insecure randomness (Math.random()) for security-sensitive ID/token/key generation.

verification.summary: All tests that can run pass successfully. Pre-existing zod dependency resolution failures in some packages (agent-runtime, federation, security) are NOT caused by these changes. Core test suites: common 39/39, shared-ui 257/257, security 150/150 (passing tests), moderation 332/332, recommendations 114/114, agent-runtime 87/87 (passing tests).
